posts.author: Abhi_invests
posts.community: Vasa Denticity aka Dentalkart - The Indian Amazon of Dental supplies ?!
posts.text: I have some friends who work at dentalkart , here’s basic feedback I got from them - The company is run by a family. Vikas and Sandeep are cousins and come from a business family. Although Vikas has claimed in podcasts that he came from a poor background, the promoter shareholding suggests that he held stakes in family-owned companies. The company suffered a major IT breach last year and reportedly lost a significant amount of data that could not be recovered. This incident was not disclosed publicly. There appears to be little innovation or long-term strategic vision within the company. Emplo…
